name: Levels.fyi
description: Community-driven salary data, primarily for mid-to-large tech companies.

name: Stack Overflow Developer Survey
description: An annual, comprehensive survey of software developers covering technology trends, demographics, and salaries.

name: Glassdoor
description: Crowdsourced salary data, company reviews, and job postings across many industries and locations.

name: PayScale
description: Crowdsourced compensation data to help understand market rates for various roles.

name: Reddit - r/cscareerquestions
description: A large online community for discussing careers in computer science, including job searches, interviews, and market sentiment.

name: Hacker News
description: A technology-focused news aggregator and forum with high-quality discussions and monthly hiring threads.

name: Blind
description: An anonymous professional network for candid discussions about compensation, interviews, and culture at tech companies.
